name: Ko-fi Creator Support API
what_it_does: Ko-fi API and webhook system for creator tipping and membership platform. Enables programmatic handling of donations, membership subscriptions, shop orders, and supporter data. Ko-fi is popular among artists, streamers, and content creators receiving community support payments.
use_cases: Receiving and processing Ko-fi donation webhooks from creator automation agents
Querying supporter and membership data from creator business agents
Triggering automated responses to new Ko-fi supporters from community agents
Syncing Ko-fi shop orders with fulfillment systems from creator commerce agents
not_for: High-volume commercial transactions (Ko-fi is community support focused)
best_when: A creator using Ko-fi wants AI agents to automate supporter responses, track donation metrics, and sync Ko-fi events with other tools like Discord or email platforms.
avoid_when: You need a full e-commerce API. Ko-fi's API is webhook-focused with limited query capabilities. FINANCIAL RISK: Donation and payment data requires careful handling.

auth.notes: Ko-fi uses webhook verification token for incoming event validation. No traditional REST API — primarily webhook-based integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Ko-fi free tier: 5% fee on donations; API/webhooks included
pricing.notes: Ko-fi is free with optional Gold subscription. Webhook/API access is included.

performance.rate_limits: Webhook-based — no rate limits on receiving events

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Donation and payment data from supporters
Ko-fi is primarily webhook-based — limited query API for agents
No REST API for listing supporters or historical data
Webhook verification token must be validated on all incoming events
Supporter data includes personal information — privacy compliance required
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Donation and payment data. Webhook token verification essential. Supporter PII. PCI-DSS for payment handling.

security_score_components.security_notes: Donation and payment data. Supporter PII. Webhook token validation required. PCI-DSS for payment processing.
